omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
The Application collects information when you download and use it for our analytics purposes. This information may include information such as
• Your device's Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address)
• The pages of the Application that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages
• The time spent on the Application
• The operating system you use on your mobile device
• What actions were made while using the Application
• Anonymized uploaded images and taken photos in the Application
